Implement zone map pruning on sorted l_shipdate and o_orderdate (I/O bound)

Expected combined improvement: 760ms -> 300-400ms, meeting baseline target. Save SIMD/partitioning for iteration 2 if needed to reach DuckDB's 77ms.
notes: Agent selection: critical_fix[0] → Query Rewriter (semantic fix), optimizations[1] → I/O Optimizer (zone maps), [2] → Execution Optimizer (Bloom filters), [6] → Execution Optimizer (hash map replacement). Be aggressive with implementation - rollback capability protects correctness.
